intro: Everything you need to know to prepare for your hair removal service and get the best results.

cards.title: Benefits of Threading
cards.intro: Eyebrow threading is a centuries-old technique cherished throughout Asia and the Middle East.
cards.highlight_1_text: Known for its gentle and precise approach, threading is ideal for sensitive skin and serves as a safe alternative to waxing or tweezing. It removes hair without stripping the skin, minimizing irritation and protecting your complexion while delivering beautifully shaped brows.
highlight_2_items: Gentle on sensitive skin — no chemicals or hot wax applied
Precise shaping for clean, defined brows
No risk of burns or allergic reactions
Removes hair from the root for longer-lasting results
Safe for all skin types, including acne-prone skin
Quick and efficient — ideal for touch-ups between appointments

cards.title: Before Your Wax
cards.intro: Before you get stripped, be sure to tick off all of the items on our checklist:
highlight_items: Your hair is at least 1/4" long
It has been at least 4 weeks since your last wax or 3 weeks since you last shaved
You are not on any medication that causes the skin to be sensitive (Accutane, Retin-A, Hydroxy Acids)
You have not engaged in heavy exercise, swimming or suntanning 24 hours prior to service

cards.title: Helpful Tips
cards.intro: Follow these tips for the smoothest experience and best results:
highlight_items: Take an Ibuprofen 30-45 mins prior to service to reduce pain
Take a warm shower and lightly exfoliate the skin. This will provide an easier exit of the hair follicles and ensure a smooth wax.
Do not apply any creams, gels or oils that may prevent the wax from adhering to the hair
Keep the service area clean and dry
Do not drink alcohol before service. Stimulants in the system can cause the skin to be extra sensitive.
